message:
Implement tail operator using new executor API

Ports the tail operator to use the new Operator<Input, Output> pattern.
The operator buffers all input and emits the last N rows in finalize(),
which is necessary since the "last N" cannot be determined until the
stream ends. The buffering is optimized to trim front rows as they
accumulate, avoiding unbounded memory growth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
